name: estimatrix
description: Two-axis sizing rubric for effort AND complexity. Effort as T-shirt (XS / S / M / L / XL / XXL); complexity as low / medium / high. Runs active conversational intake (jtbd-style) to fill missing scope and success criteria before sizing. Applies Karpathy's four code rules: state assumptions, ask if ambiguous, prefer simpler scope, require a success criterion.
